title: Yumeichan Watch Capabilities Schema
description: OCapN-compliant capability tokens for the Yumeichan Watch Interface, regulating affective disclosure, haptic engagement, and biometric telemetry on a continuous analog scale.

capability_id.description: Unique identifier for the capability grant (must map to a Holochain ActionHash).

grantor_pubkey.description: Ed25519 public key of the human user granting the capability.

grantee_pubkey.description: Ed25519 public key of the Local Agent Node (Layer 4.5) receiving the capability.

capability_type.description: The specific class of intimacy or sensory access granted.

analog_threshold_bounds.description: The [min, max] analog resonance bounds within which this capability is active.

ttl_seconds.description: Time-To-Live in seconds. Maximum of 2 hours (7200s) to prevent resonance flooding and unbounded intimacy.

locale_context.description: Cultural-locale context string dictating the baseline communication posture (e.g., 'direct-analytical', 'warm-prosocial').
